name: @mrclrchtr/supi-workspace
description: SuPi (Super Pi) — A curated extension stack for PI. Workspace root.

scripts.typecheck: for p in packages/*/tsconfig.json; do tsc --noEmit -p "$p" || exit 1; done
scripts.typecheck:tests: for p in packages/*/__tests__/tsconfig.json; do [ -f "$p" ] && tsc --noEmit -p "$p" || exit 1; done
scripts.pack:check: for p in packages/supi*; do [ -f "$p/package.json" ] || continue; node scripts/pack-staged.mjs "$p" --dry-run || exit 1; done
scripts.pack:verify: for p in packages/supi*; do [ -f "$p/package.json" ] || continue; has_bundled=$(jq -r '.bundledDependencies | if type == "array" and length > 0 then "yes" else "no" end' "$p/package.json"); [ "$has_bundled" = "yes" ] || continue; node scripts/publish.mjs "$p" || exit 1; done
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @mrclrchtr/supi-tree-sitter check:kotlin-wasm && pnpm --filter @mrclrchtr/supi-tree-sitter check:sql-wasm && pnpm typecheck && pnpm typecheck:tests && pnpm biome:ai && pnpm test && pnpm pack:check && pnpm pack:verify
